caption: A person's hand holds a clear plastic protective card sleeve over a colorful surface featuring green palm tree motifs. In the background, a small inset video window displays a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt, seated at a desk with equipment. The text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" appears prominently as a logo and watermark on the screen. Across the sequence, the person's hand tilts and maneuvers the plastic sleeve, occasionally revealing a trading card inside. The man in the inset window remains in a similar seated position, observing the action. The scene transitions from a close-up view of the empty sleeve to a view where a card is partially visible through the plastic, while the overall setting of the desk and the "JASPYS" branding remain constant.
